title: The Tales of Beedle the Bard
description:
A collection fairy tales for young wizards and witches, with each story followed by observations on Wizarding history, personal reminiscences, and information on the story's key elements by Hogwarts headmaster, Albus Dumbledore.

Wizard and the Hopping Pot --
Fountain of Fair Fortune --
Warlock's Hairy Heart --
Babbitty Rabbitty and her Cackling Stump --
Tale of the Three Brothers.
subjects: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry (Imaginary place)
Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry (Imaginary organization)
Romans, nouvelles, etc. pour la jeunesse
